time.morning: The office hums with the energy of early arrivals settling in.
time.afternoon: The office buzzes steadily with the midday workload.
time.evening: Colleagues are packing up their things as evening sets in.
time.night: The office stands dark and empty at this late hour.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You immediately map the workspace, noting organizational inefficiencies and potential pressure points.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Small details catch your eye at once — a sticky note with a phone number, an open file on a desk.
attribute.STEALTH: You slip in unnoticed, blending into the background of busy workers.
attribute.EMPATHY: You can feel the undercurrent of stress among the staff even before anyone speaks.

time.morning: Early risers fill the gym with focused, purposeful energy.
time.afternoon: A smaller midday crowd works out at a relaxed pace.
time.evening: The after-work crowd makes the gym lively and competitive.
time.night: Only the most dedicated athletes are still here at this hour.

attribute.STRENGTH: You feel right at home among the iron and sweat — this is your territory.
attribute.STAMINA: Your eyes immediately find the cardio section. You could run laps around everyone here.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You study the biomechanics of other gym-goers, mentally cataloguing their form and technique.
attribute.AGILITY: You move through the space with ease, already sizing up the open floor for footwork drills.

time.morning: The station buzzes with morning briefings and officers starting their shifts.
time.afternoon: A steady stream of reports and interviews keeps the afternoon busy.
time.evening: The day shift is winding down; night-shift officers are checking in.
time.night: Only the night-duty officers remain, the station quieter but watchful.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You pick up on the subtle tension between two officers near the board — something happened recently.
attribute.INTIMIDATION: Heads turn as you walk in. Your presence commands attention even here.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The case board catches your eye; you spot a connection the team might have missed.
attribute.CHARISMA: You exchange a nod with the desk sergeant. People like you here — they'll talk.

time.morning: The library is quiet, its early patrons absorbed in their reading.
time.afternoon: Students and researchers fill the reading tables in the afternoon light.
time.evening: The library is peaceful in the evening glow, the shelves casting long shadows.
time.night: The library is closed. Only a faint light from the back suggests someone is still inside.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Your gaze sweeps the stacks methodically; you already know exactly which section you need.
attribute.MEMORY: Titles and call numbers leap out at you — you've been here before and remember every shelf.
attribute.PERCEPTION: A book slightly out of place, a bookmark left carelessly — someone was here recently and in a hurry.
attribute.INTUITION: Something about the atmosphere feels off. The silence is a little too deliberate.

time.morning: The morning rush is underway — nurses, doctors, and porters moving briskly.
time.afternoon: The hospital settles into its afternoon rhythm of rounds and consultations.
time.evening: Visiting hours are ending and families are saying their goodbyes.
time.night: Only emergency and night staff are present; the corridors are hushed.

attribute.EMPATHY: You can feel the weight of worry carried by every person you pass.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: Medical charts and equipment ratings catch your eye — you notice things others walk past.
attribute.STAMINA: The relentless pace of the place energises rather than exhausts you.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice a patient being wheeled in whose injuries don't quite match the reported accident.

time.morning: Joggers and dog walkers fill the park in the crisp morning air.
time.afternoon: Families and friends relax on the grass in the warm afternoon sun.
time.evening: The park takes on a golden hue as the sun dips low.
time.night: The park is deserted and still; the lamp-posts cast small pools of yellow light.

attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice a discarded item near the bench that most people have walked straight past.
attribute.STAMINA: The open space calls to you; your legs itch to break into a run.
attribute.INTUITION: Despite the peaceful appearance, something at the edge of your awareness nags at you.
attribute.CHARISMA: A couple on a bench waves at you — you have one of those faces people just trust.

time.morning: The breakfast crowd lingers over coffee and early plates.
time.afternoon: The lunchtime rush is in full swing, every table occupied.
time.evening: Soft lighting and the murmur of conversation fill the room at dinner.
time.night: The kitchen is winding down; only a few late-night diners remain.

attribute.CHARISMA: The host greets you warmly before you've even said a word.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You scan the room in seconds — who is nervous, who is meeting whom, who doesn't fit.
attribute.EMPATHY: The staff here are tired. You catch the subtle signs and make a point of being patient.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The menu is a code of sorts. You order the dish that will take longest to prepare, giving you more time.
